name: ghost-agent-workflow
description: Codex skills for v3 task DAG planning, reusable child thread coordination, scoped workers, and safe Git commits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan task DAGs, reuse scoped child threads, and commit safely.
interface.longDescription: Packages parallel-task-planner, thread-coordination, thread-goal-worker, and git-commit. Parallel execution uses validated v3 module/task JSON plans, every dependency-ready task starts immediately, same-module task chains reuse retained user-visible child threads, workers stay inside scoped goals, and reviewed changes are committed in the required order.
defaultPrompt: Use $parallel-task-planner to generate a validated v3 module/task DAG plan with complete worker profiles.
Use $thread-coordination to execute every ready task in an authorized v3 plan and reuse same-module child threads.
Use $thread-goal-worker for one scoped task bound to a retained child thread by the coordinator.
Use $git-commit to create a local execution thread with a one-shot startup health check and model fallback, then commit the current changes there.
